Method: KDFlow采用解耦式架构，利用FSDP2高效训练学生模型，同时用SGLang高效推理教师模型，通过零拷贝只传输教师的隐藏状态，在学生侧重算logits，减小了通信开销。支持异策略和同策略蒸馏，并通过灵活易用的API支持跨tokenizer的蒸馏算法。

Result: 实验表明，在与现有主流KD框架对比下，KDFlow可实现1.44倍到6.36倍的速度提升，大幅提升原型开发与大规模蒸馏速度。

Conclusion: KDFlow有效提升了LLM蒸馏的效率、扩展性和易用性，是推进大模型压缩和落地的重要工具。

Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an essential technique to compress large language models (LLMs) into smaller ones. However, despite the distinct roles of the student model and the teacher model in KD, most existing frameworks still use a homogeneous training backend (e.g., FSDP and DeepSpeed) for both models, leading to suboptimal training efficiency. In this paper, we present a novel framework for LLM distillation, termed \textbf{KDFlow}, which features a decoupled architecture and employs SGLang for teacher inference. By bridging the training efficiency of FSDP2 and the inference efficiency of SGLang, KDFlow achieves full utilization of both advantages in a unified system. Moreover, instead of transferring full logits across different processes, our framework only transmits the teacher's hidden states using zero-copy data transfer and recomputes the logits on the student side, effectively balancing the communication cost and KD performance. Furthermore, our framework supports both off-policy and on-policy distillation and incorporates KD algorithms for cross-tokenizer KD through highly extensible and user-friendly APIs. Experiments show that KDFlow can achieve \textbf{1.44$\times$ to 6.36$\times$} speedup compared to current KD frameworks, enabling researchers to rapidly prototype and scale LLM distillation with minimal engineering overhead. Code is available at: https://github.com/songmzhang/KDFlow

</details>


### [412] [FLANS at SemEval-2026 Task 7: RAG with Open-Sourced Smaller LLMs for Everyday Knowledge Across Diverse Languages and Cultures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01910)
*Liliia Bogdanova,Shiran Sun,Lifeng Han,Natalia Amat Lefort,Flor Miriam Plaza-del-Arco*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了作者在SemEval-2025 Task-7“跨语言与文化的日常知识”中的系统方案，参与了简答题和多项选择题两个分任务，主要采用基于开源小型语言模型（sLLMs）的检索增强生成（RAG）方法，构建了具有文化意识的知识库并融入网络在线搜索，实现了多语言（中、英、西）支持，同时追求隐私保护和可持续性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大模型在处理跨语言、跨文化的日常知识时存在知识覆盖不足、模型训练成本高、隐私和可持续发展等问题，因此需要探索高效、开源、小模型驱动的解决办法，提升多语言和多文化智能问答能力。

Method: 采用开源小型LLM，通过检索增强生成（RAG）实现问答；自建文化敏感知识库（CulKBs），从Wikipedia筛选相关内容，区分国家和文化特定的Wiki文本。同时，整合DuckDuckGo的在线搜索结果，平台部署基于Ollama，使用优化设计的提示词，并对其学习曲线进行分析。

Result: 系统在英文、西班牙文和中文三个语言下参与了两项问答任务，并成功实现以小型开源模型结合自建文化知识库和在线搜索的问答支持。分享了所有的技术资源和代码。

Conclusion: 小型开源LLM配合自建文化知识库及外部检索，能够在多语言、多文化背景下有效提升问答准确性和可用性，并有助于推动问答系统的隐私保护和可持续发展。

Abstract: This system paper describes our participation in the SemEval-2025 Task-7 ``Everyday Knowledge Across Diverse Languages and Cultures''. We attended two subtasks, i.e., Track 1: Short Answer Questions (SAQ), and Track 2: Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQ). The methods we used are retrieval augmented generation (RAGs) with open-sourced smaller LLMs (OS-sLLMs). To better adapt to this shared task, we created our own culturally aware knowledge base (CulKBs) by extracting Wikipedia content using keyword lists we prepared. We extracted both culturally-aware wiki-text and country-specific wiki-summary. In addition to the local CulKBs, we also have one system integrating live online search output via DuckDuckGo. Towards better privacy and sustainability, we aimed to deploy smaller LLMs (sLLMs) that are open-sourced on the Ollama platform. We share the prompts we developed using refinement techniques and report the learning curve of such prompts. The tested languages are English, Spanish, and Chinese for both tracks. Our resources and codes are shared via https://github.com/aaronlifenghan/FLANS-2026

</details>


### [413] [Demonstrating ViviDoc: Generating Interactive Documents through Human-Agent Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01912)
*Yinghao Tang,Yupeng Xie,Yingchaojie Feng,Tingfeng Lan,Wei Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ViviDoc是一个人机协作系统，通过多代理流程与中间表示文档规范，实现从单一主题自动生成交互式教育文档，让制作复杂交互材料更加简单可控。用户与系统协作，明显优于仅靠大模型的自动生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前交互式文章能帮助理解复杂概念，但其制作过程繁琐，需专业和编程技能，现有大模型虽然能自动生成内容，但缺少可控性、难以验证，难以满足实际教育需求。

Method: 提出ViviDoc系统，核心包括三个代理（规划者、执行者、评估者）与一种名为DocSpec的文档规范。DocSpec将每个交互可视化分解为状态、渲染、转换和约束等组件，供教师审阅和修改，实现代码生成前的人类监督和调整。

Result: 通过专家评测和用户研究，ViviDoc在生成质量和编辑体验方面，明显优于单一大模型的不加控制自动生成方案，用户易于理解和使用。

Conclusion: ViviDoc显著降低了交互教育文档的创作门槛，让非程序背景的教育者也能高效生成高质量教材，提升了人机协作式内容创作的控制力和可用性。

Abstract: Interactive articles help readers engage with complex ideas through exploration, yet creating them remains costly, requiring both domain expertise and web development skills. Recent LLM-based agents can automate content creation, but naively applying them yields uncontrollable and unverifiable outputs. We present ViviDoc, a human-agent collaborative system that generates interactive educational documents from a single topic input. ViviDoc introduces a multi-agent pipeline (Planner, Executor, Evaluator) and the Document Specification (DocSpec), a human-readable intermediate representation that decomposes each interactive visualization into State, Render, Transition, and Constraint components. The DocSpec enables educators to review and refine generation plans before code is produced, bridging the gap between pedagogical intent and executable output. Expert evaluation and a user study show that ViviDoc substantially outperforms naive agentic generation and provides an intuitive editing experience. Our project homepage is available at https://vividoc-homepage.vercel.app/.

</details>


### [414] [AdaPonderLM: Gated Pondering Language Models with Token-Wise Adaptive Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01914)
*Shixiang Song,He Li,Zitong Wang,Boyi Zeng,Feichen Song,Yixuan Wang,Zhiqin John Xu,Ziwei He,Zhouhan Lin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AdaPonderLM是一种能自适应早停的自监督循环语言模型，在推理时节省约10%的计算量，同时保持优良表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的循环/迭代Transformer模型测试时推理步骤数固定，导致对简单token也消耗不必要的计算，缺乏针对token的自适应处理，且需要人工调节早停等参数。作者希望提升推理效率，并实现token级别的自适应计算。

Method: 借鉴Adaptive Computation Time（ACT）与Early Exit（EE）思路，设计AdaPonderLM：模型内置基于MLP的门控机制，以及单调halting mask，实现token级别是否继续迭代的自决定；中途停下的token会复用已缓存的key/value状态，保证训练和测试一致并高效加速，此机制完全自监督，不用人工分配停靠比例。

Result: 在Pythia系列基座（规模70M~410M训练、最大至2.8B持续训练）上，AdaPonderLM推理阶段可减少约10%的计算量，同时困惑度和下游任务准确率几乎无损。门控机制自发将更多算力分配给高NLL（更难预测）token，展现了自适应计算行为，并在同等计算预算下显著优于固定剪枝。

Conclusion: AdaPonderLM无需手动配置，实现token粒度的自适应运算分配，有效减少推理所需计算，且保持性能，优于传统的平均深度减少方式。

Abstract: Test-time scaling via recurrent/iterative Transformers enables large language models to spend more computation at inference, but most pretrained recurrent LMs run a fixed number of iterations, wasting compute on easy tokens and lacking token-wise adaptivity. Following the core idea of Adaptive Computation Time(ACT) and Early Exit(EE), we propose AdaPonderLM, a self-supervised recurrent language model that learns token-wise early exiting during pretraining without manually tuned per-token/per-layer pruning ratios. AdaPonderLM uses iteration-specific MLP gates with a monotonic halting mask to decide when each token stops recurring, and introduces a KV reuse mechanism that reuses cached key/value states for halted tokens, ensuring train--test consistency and practical acceleration. Across Pythia backbones from 70M to 410M (pretraining) and up to 2.8B (continued pretraining), AdaPonderLM reduces inference compute at about 10% while maintaining comparable language modeling perplexity and competitive downstream accuracy. Our analysis shows the learned gates allocate more computation to high-NLL (hard) tokens, exhibiting adaptive computation time behavior in a fully self-supervised setting. Meanwhile, under iso-FLOPs, the learned halting policy consistently outperforms fixed pruning, showing AdaPonderLM allocates compute to the right tokens rather than just reducing average depth.

</details>


### [415] [From Variance to Invariance: Qualitative Content Analysis for Narrative Graph Annotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01930)
*Junbo Huang,Max Weinig,Ulrich Fritsche,Ricardo Usbeck*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于叙事图的经济新闻叙事注释框架，并提供首个有向无环图（DAG）形式的通胀叙事数据集。从评注一致性和人际标签变异性入手，为NLP领域新闻叙事图注释提供了实践指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经济新闻叙事在影响公众对经济事件（如通胀）的理解中非常重要，但现有NLP方法在结构化地注释和评估这些叙事存在挑战，特别在人类注释一致性和误差管控方面。

Method: 提出一种结合定性内容分析（QCA）理念的叙事图注释框架，将新闻叙事以DAG表示，节点为事件，边为因果关系。开展了6（叙事表示）×3（距离度量类型）因子实验，比较不同表示和距离度量对注释一致性的影响，并采用基于图的Krippendorff’s α评估一致性。

Result: 实验发现：1）宽松的度量方法（如基于重叠的距离）会高估注释一致性；2）局部约束的表示（如仅一跳邻居）有助于减少注释变异性。

Conclusion: 该叙事图注释框架及分析为NLP界在应对新闻叙事图注释的一致性和人际差异提供了实际操作建议，并开源了数据集和评测工具。

Abstract: Narratives in news discourse play a critical role in shaping public understanding of economic events, such as inflation. Annotating and evaluating these narratives in a structured manner remains a key challenge for Natural Language Processing (NLP). In this work, we introduce a narrative graph annotation framework that integrates principles from qualitative content analysis (QCA) to prioritize annotation quality by reducing annotation errors. We present a dataset of inflation narratives annotated as directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), where nodes represent events and edges encode causal relations. To evaluate annotation quality, we employed a $6\times3$ factorial experimental design to examine the effects of narrative representation (six levels) and distance metric type (three levels) on inter-annotator agreement (Krippendorrf's $α$), capturing the presence of human label variation (HLV) in narrative interpretations. Our analysis shows that (1) lenient metrics (overlap-based distance) overestimate reliability, and (2) locally-constrained representations (e.g., one-hop neighbors) reduce annotation variability. Our annotation and implementation of graph-based Krippendorrf's $α$ are open-sourced. The annotation framework and evaluation results provide practical guidance for NLP research on graph-based narrative annotation under HLV.

</details>


### [416] [When Numbers Tell Half the Story: Human-Metric Alignment in Topic Model Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01945)
*Thibault Prouteau,Francis Lareau,Nicolas Dugué,Jean-Charles Lamirel,Christophe Malaterre*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的主题模型人工评测任务——Topic Word Mixing（TWM），用于更好地测量主题间的区分性，并在涉及哲学和科学文献的专业领域数据集上，系统对比自动评估指标与人工评估方法。研究发现，不同评价方法在专业语料上存在分歧，TWM更能反映人的主题区分感知。作者公开了标注数据和测试代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主题模型质量评估存在难点，尤其在专业领域。现有自动化评估指标如主题一致性和多样性并不能充分反映人工判断。面向一般领域的人类评测如词语侵入（Word Intrusion）在专业领域也未充足验证，且成本高。因此，需开发能兼顾自动化与人类感受的新评测机制。

Method: 提出TWM评测任务，通过构建单一或组合主题词集，由人工判别其混合或纯净，以度量主题区分性。将该方法与词语侵入、自动一致性和多样性指标相结合，应用于六种不同类型主题模型，并在哲学科学专业文献数据集上收集4000余条人工标注，系统对比各评测工具。

Result: 实验结果表明，词语侵入与一致性自动指标在专业领域不总一致，TWM能更好反映人工对主题区分性的判断，并较好对应多样性指标。发布了高质量人工标注数据与代码。

Conclusion: 文章强调在专业语料场景下，现有自动和人工评测存在局限，TWM方法能有效填补主题模型人工和自动评估之间的空缺，提示需构建融合两者的评测体系。

Abstract: Topic models uncover latent thematic structures in text corpora, yet evaluating their quality remains challenging, particularly in specialized domains. Existing methods often rely on automated metrics like topic coherence and diversity, which may not fully align with human judgment. Human evaluation tasks, such as word intrusion, provide valuable insights but are costly and primarily validated on general-domain corpora. This paper introduces Topic Word Mixing (TWM), a novel human evaluation task assessing inter-topic distinctness by testing whether annotators can distinguish between word sets from single or mixed topics. TWM complements word intrusion's focus on intra-topic coherence and provides a human-grounded counterpart to diversity metrics. We evaluate six topic models - both statistical and embedding-based (LDA, NMF, Top2Vec, BERTopic, CFMF, CFMF-emb) - comparing automated metrics with human evaluation methods based on nearly 4,000 annotations from a domain-specific corpus of philosophy of science publications. Our findings reveal that word intrusion and coherence metrics do not always align, particularly in specialized domains, and that TWM captures human-perceived distinctness while appearing to align with diversity metrics. We release the annotated dataset and task generation code. This work highlights the need for evaluation frameworks bridging automated and human assessments, particularly for domain-specific corpora.

</details>


### [417] [AMemGym: Interactive Memory Benchmarking for Assistants in Long-Horizon Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01966)
*Cheng Jiayang,Dongyu Ru,Lin Qiu,Yiyang Li,Xuezhi Cao,Yangqiu Song,Xunliang Cai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AMemGym，一个用于评估与优化大模型助手（LLM assistant）长期记忆管理能力的交互式环境，实现结构化的、可扩展的、对话驱动的记忆评价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前用户与大模型助手的长周期交互需要高效且有效的记忆管理，但现有的记忆测评方法多基于静态、离线的数据，评价有限且不够可靠，且不便于大规模和动态优化。

Method: 提出AMemGym，采用结构化数据采样预定义用户画像、问题和状态演化轨迹。通过LLM模拟用户并基于剧情扮演暴露状态。用结构化数据指标综合评估和优化记忆系统。

Result: 实验发现当前主流的记忆系统（如RAG、长上下文LLM及agentic memory）在长期记忆管理任务中均存在明显不足，并分析了成因。

Conclusion: AMemGym实现了结构化状态与自由对话的桥接，能高效筛选与优化记忆方案，有潜力支持记忆管理能力的自进化，为对话体智能体记忆能力的提升提供了强大、可扩展的评测与优化工具。

Abstract: Long-horizon interactions between users and LLM-based assistants necessitate effective memory management, yet current approaches face challenges in training and evaluation of memory. Existing memory benchmarks rely on static, off-policy data as context, limiting evaluation reliability and scalability. To address these gaps, we introduce AMemGym, an interactive environment enabling on-policy evaluation and optimization for memory-driven personalization. AMemGym employs structured data sampling to predefine user profiles, state-dependent questions, and state evolution trajectories, enabling cost-effective generation of high-quality, evaluation-aligned interactions. LLM-simulated users expose latent states through role-play while maintaining structured state consistency. Comprehensive metrics based on structured data guide both assessment and optimization of assistants. Extensive experiments reveal performance gaps in existing memory systems (e.g., RAG, long-context LLMs, and agentic memory) and corresponding reasons. AMemGym not only enables effective selection among competing approaches but also can potentially drive the self-evolution of memory management strategies. By bridging structured state evolution with free-form interactions, our framework provides a scalable, diagnostically rich environment for advancing memory capabilities in conversational agents.

</details>


### [418] [CharacterFlywheel: Scaling Iterative Improvement of Engaging and Steerable LLMs in Production](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01973)
*Yixin Nie,Lin Guan,Zhongyao Ma,Anchit Gupta,Yipin Zhou,Xiao Li,Zhengping Zhou,Raymond Zeng,Gelin Zhou,Shigan Chu,Ajay Thampi,Wancen Mu,Nathan Shuster,Ketong Wang,Lin Chen,Jason Brewer,Derek Hao Hu,Alexander McCauley,Jason Weston,Sem Park,Na Zhang,Kevin Tang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本报告提出了CharacterFlywheel流程，通过多代迭代持续优化用于Instagram、WhatsApp和Messenger社交应用中的大语言模型（LLM），在真实用户流量中实现了显著的用户参与度和模型可控性提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着社交平台对高质量对话机器人的需求日益增加，如何在实际生产环境中持续提升LLM性能、用户参与度与可控性，并防止过拟合成为核心挑战。

Method: 以LLaMA 3.1为起点，设计了CharacterFlywheel迭代流程，结合内部与外部真实用户数据，经历15代模型进化。流程包括数据筛选、基于奖励建模的参与度指标优化、监督微调（SFT）、强化学习（RL）和双线（离线+在线）评估，且在每一步都有过拟合防控等工程实践。

Result: 2024年7月至2025年4月期间，连续部署更新15次，7/8的新模型相较基线均获得正向提升，最佳模型在用户参与广度提升8.8%，深度提升19.4%；指令跟随率由59.2%升至84.8%，违规率降至5.8%。

Conclusion: CharacterFlywheel流程为大语言模型在大规模社交应用场景下的可持续优化提供了科学严谨的工程方法，对高效服务数百万用户起到了积极推动作用。

Abstract: This report presents CharacterFlywheel, an iterative flywheel process for improving large language models (LLMs) in production social chat applications across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger. Starting from LLaMA 3.1, we refined models across 15 generations using data from both internal and external real-user traffic. Through continuous deployments from July 2024 to April 2025, we conducted controlled 7-day A/B tests showing consistent engagement improvements: 7 of 8 newly deployed models demonstrated positive lift over the baseline, with the strongest performers achieving up to 8.8% improvement in engagement breadth and 19.4% in engagement depth. We also observed substantial gains in steerability, with instruction following increasing from 59.2% to 84.8% and instruction violations decreasing from 26.6% to 5.8%. We detail the CharacterFlywheel process which integrates data curation, reward modeling to estimate and interpolate the landscape of engagement metrics, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), and both offline and online evaluation to ensure reliable progress at each optimization step. We also discuss our methods for overfitting prevention and navigating production dynamics at scale. These contributions advance the scientific rigor and understanding of LLMs in social applications serving millions of users.

</details>


### [419] [PonderLM-3: Adaptive Token-Wise Pondering with Differentiable Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02023)
*He Li,Feichen Song,Boyi Zeng,Shixiang Song,Zhiqin John Xu,Ziwei He,Zhouhan Lin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PonderLM-3是一种针对每个token自适应分配推理计算资源的新预训练框架，提高了推理效率和生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的推理计算资源分配策略通常是统一地给每个token额外计算，而测试看到增加推理资源可以提升生成质量，因此提出如何更高效地分配计算资源的问题。

Method: 提出PonderLM-3框架，在PonderLM-2基础上采用token级自适应计算分配机制。在预训练阶段通过加入可微分的注意力mask，并在推理阶段采用匹配的硬裁剪规则，使得每个token根据实际需要动态分配计算资源。整个过程保持训练和推理一致性，实现端到端可微分。

Result: PonderLM-3在相同推理FLOPs下，相较于现有递归或自适应基线，预训练困惑度更低；下游任务中在相同最大附加计算步数下，与定步PonderLM-2性能相当，但实际推理FLOPs消耗更少。

Conclusion: PonderLM-3实现了token级自适应推理计算分配，显著提升了计算效率，使额外推理计算能更精准地用在最需要的token上。

Abstract: Test-time scaling has shown that allocating more additional computation at inference can improve generation quality, motivating a natural follow-up question: where should this computation be spent? Building on this insight, we introduce PonderLM-3, a pretraining framework for token-wise adaptive pondering that learns to selectively allocate additional computation under purely self-supervised objectives, built on top of the PonderLM-2 backbone. This makes additional inference computation an allocatable per-token resource, so tokens receive more computation only when it is beneficial, rather than paying a uniform extra cost. To make this allocation learnable while maintaining train-inference consistency, PonderLM-3 injects a differentiable attention mask during pretraining and pairs it with a matching hard pruning rule at inference. PonderLM-3 defines a stronger Pareto frontier: compared with existing recursive or adaptive baselines, it achieves lower pretraining perplexity at equal inference FLOPs. On downstream benchmarks, PonderLM-3 attains comparable performance to fixed-step PonderLM-2 under the same maximum number of additional computation steps, while using fewer inference FLOPs in practice. Overall, PonderLM-3 provides an end-to-end differentiable and train-inference consistent framework for token-wise adaptive computation, enabling additional inference compute to be allocated where it is most useful rather than paid uniformly by every token.

</details>


### [420] [MMR-Life: Piecing Together Real-life Scenes for Multimodal Multi-image Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02024)
*Jiachun Li,Shaoping Huang,Zhuoran Jin,Chenlong Zhang,Pengfei Cao,Yubo Chen,Kang Liu,Jun Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了MMR-Life基准，用以全面评估多模态大模型在真实场景下多图像推理能力。涵盖七种推理类型，并通过评测37个主流模型，发现任务极具挑战性，最先进模型准确率仅58%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大模型虽然能够处理复杂的科学和数学推理任务，但其在现实多场景下的推理能力仍有待系统性评测，缺乏统一的标准。为解决评测空白，作者提出统一且覆盖广泛的推理基准。

Method: 作者构建了MMR-Life数据集，包含2646道多选题和19108张现实图片，覆盖七大推理类型。该数据集要求模型整合多幅图片信息进行多元推理，并对37个主流多模态模型进行横向评测及推理能力分析。

Result: 评测结果显示，MMR-Life对各模型均具极大挑战性，最顶级模型GPT-5准确率仅58%，且在不同推理类型上表现不均。一并分析了影响推理表现的关键因素。

Conclusion: MMR-Life基准为多模态推理系统的评测、分析与提升提供了全面且多维的基础，有助于推动下代多模态推理模型的研究和发展。

Abstract: Recent progress in the reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has empowered them to address more complex tasks such as scientific analysis and mathematical reasoning. Despite their promise, MLLMs' reasoning abilities across different scenarios in real life remain largely unexplored and lack standardized benchmarks for evaluation. To address this gap, we introduce MMR-Life, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the diverse multimodal multi-image reasoning capabilities of MLLMs across real-life scenarios. MMR-Life consists of 2,646 multiple-choice questions based on 19,108 images primarily sourced from real-world contexts, comprehensively covering seven reasoning types: abductive, analogical, causal, deductive, inductive, spatial, and temporal. Unlike existing reasoning benchmarks, MMR-Life does not rely on domain-specific expertise but instead requires models to integrate information across multiple images and apply diverse reasoning abilities. The evaluation of 37 advanced models highlights the substantial challenge posed by MMR-Life. Even top models like GPT-5 achieve only 58% accuracy and display considerable variance in performance across reasoning types. Moreover, we analyze the reasoning paradigms of existing MLLMs, exploring how factors such as thinking length, reasoning method, and reasoning type affect their performance. In summary, MMR-Life establishes a comprehensive foundation for evaluating, analyzing, and improving the next generation of multimodal reasoning systems.

</details>


### [421] [EstLLM: Enhancing Estonian Capabilities in Multilingual LLMs via Continued Pretraining and Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02041)
*Aleksei Dorkin,Taido Purason,Emil Kalbaliyev,Hele-Andra Kuulmets,Marii Ojastu,Mark Fišel,Tanel Alumäe,Eleri Aedmaa,Krister Kruusmaa,Kairit Sirts*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了通过持续预训练（CPT）增强多语言大模型对小语种（如爱沙尼亚语）的能力，同时保持模型原本对英语及推理任务的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主流大模型主要用以英语为中心的数据训练，导致对小语种如爱沙尼亚语的处理能力较弱。如何兼顾小语种提升而不损失英语与通用能力，是多语言模型发展的难点。

Method: 以Llama 3.1 8B为基础，采用多样数据混合（包含更多爱沙尼亚语、英语、代码、数学及任务导向数据）进行持续预训练，以及后续的有监督微调、偏好优化和指令合并，平衡多语言能力与任务对齐。

Result: 在一系列爱沙尼亚语言基准测试中，模型的语言能力、知识、推理、翻译与指令跟随能力均明显提升。同时，英语表现基本保持，与原始模型及其指令微调版相比更为均衡且优异。

Conclusion: 合理的持续预训练数据混合与后期对齐策略，可以显著增强多语言模型对特定小语种的能力，同时不损失对主流语言的表现，是提升多语言大模型应用价值的有效途径。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are predominantly trained on English-centric data, resulting in uneven performance for smaller languages. We study whether continued pretraining (CPT) can substantially improve Estonian capabilities in a pretrained multilingual LLM while preserving its English and general reasoning performance. Using Llama 3.1 8B as the main base model, we perform CPT on a mixture that increases Estonian exposure while approximating the original training distribution through English replay and the inclusion of code, mathematics, and instruction-like data. We subsequently apply supervised fine-tuning, preference optimization, and chat vector merging to introduce robust instruction-following behavior. Evaluation on a comprehensive suite of Estonian benchmarks shows consistent gains in linguistic competence, knowledge, reasoning, translation quality, and instruction-following compared to the original base model and its instruction-tuned variant, while maintaining competitive performance on English benchmarks. These findings indicate that CPT, with an appropriately balanced data mixture, together with post-training alignment, can substantially improve single-language capabilities in pretrained multilingual LLMs.

</details>


### [422] [What Exactly do Children Receive in Language Acquisition? A Case Study on CHILDES with Automated Detection of Filler-Gap Dependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02082)
*Zhenghao Herbert Zhou,William Dai,Maya Viswanathan,Simon Charlow,R. Thomas McCoy,Robert Frank*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一套系统，能自动识别儿童语料中三类主要的filler-gap结构，并细致划分其提取位置，从而有助于深入分析儿童如何获取该类句法依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 儿童习得filler-gap依赖的机制存在争议：一派认为依赖于先天语法知识，另一派则主张儿童语料中的分布信息已足够。然而，真实语料中相关输入成分难以大规模、细致标注与量化，导致该争议难以解决。

Method: 作者开发并验证了一种结合成分句法分析与依存句法分析的自动化系统，能在英语儿童语料（CHILDES）中识别并细分三类filler-gap结构（主句wh问句、嵌套wh问句、关系从句），并进一步标注提取位点（主语、宾语、状语）。系统在人工标注数据句上进行了测试，得分较高。

Result: 系统被应用于57个英语CHILDES语料库，成功统计和刻画了儿童接触和产出不同filler-gap结构的发展轨迹，具体包括构式频率和提取位点不对称等详细现象。

Conclusion: 该系统产出的细化标签为后续儿童语言习得和计算建模研究提供了坚实基础，并通过使用过滤后的语料训练语言模型进行了初步展示，表明该系统具有广泛的研究和应用前景。

Abstract: Children's acquisition of filler-gap dependencies has been argued by some to depend on innate grammatical knowledge, while others suggest that the distributional evidence available in child-directed speech suffices. Unfortunately, the relevant input is difficult to quantify at scale with fine granularity, making this question difficult to resolve. We present a system that identifies three core filler-gap constructions in spoken English corpora -- matrix wh-questions, embedded wh-questions, and relative clauses -- and further identifies the extraction site (i.e., subject vs. object vs. adjunct). Our approach combines constituency and dependency parsing, leveraging their complementary strengths for construction classification and extraction site identification. We validate the system on human-annotated data and find that it scores well across most categories. Applying the system to 57 English CHILDES corpora, we are able to characterize children's filler-gap input and their filler-gap production trajectories over the course of development, including construction-specific frequencies and extraction-site asymmetries. The resulting fine-grained labels enable future work in both acquisition and computational studies, which we demonstrate with a case study using filtered corpus training with language models.

</details>


### [423] [Modeling Grammatical Hypothesis Testing in Young Learners: A Sequence-Based Learning Analytics Study of Morphosyntactic Reasoning in an Interactive Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02084)
*Thierry Geoffre,Trystan Geoffre*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究通过分析小学生在法语语法交互游戏中的详细操作序列，揭示了他们在句子构建过程中的真实认知策略，提出了一种基于序列的学习分析方法，有助于为教学和个别化辅导提供实时支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统语法评估方法多依赖最终答案，难以洞察学习者在完成任务时的具体认知和推理过程。因此，研究动机在于通过细粒度的序列分析，揭示语法推理中的动态策略，为更精准的教学和评估提供依据。

Method: 研究采集了100名8-11岁学生在课堂环境下参与法语形态句法一致性游戏的游戏数据，总计597次游戏会话和9,783条操作。将每一次滑块操作视为假设检验行为，运用汉明距离量化与有效语法答案的接近程度，分析在不同难度练习中的收敛模式，挖掘学习者的认知轨迹。

Result: 结果发现：决定词和动词是主要困难环节，学生解题顺序常常偏离通常的左到右顺序，倾向先修正动词再调整前置成分。解题方案较少的练习题收敛更慢、更易出现反复修改。最接近正确答案的方案经常变化，显示出学生的动态假设修正过程。

Conclusion: 序列化分析能揭示学生语言推理中隐藏的维度，为未来开发实时辅助和面向教师的课堂工具奠定了基础，特别适用于多语种、多样化学习环境中的精准支持。

Abstract: This study investigates grammatical reasoning in primary school learners through a sequence-based learning analytics approach, leveraging fine-grained action sequences from an interactive game targeting morphosyntactic agreement in French. Unlike traditional assessments that rely on final answers, we treat each slider movement as a hypothesis-testing action, capturing real-time cognitive strategies during sentence construction. Analyzing 597 gameplay sessions (9,783 actions) from 100 students aged 8-11 in authentic classroom settings, we introduce Hamming distance to quantify proximity to valid grammatical solutions and examine convergence patterns across exercises with varying levels of difficulty. Results reveal that determiners and verbs are key sites of difficulty, with action sequences deviating from left-to-right usual treatment. This suggests learners often fix the verb first and adjust preceding elements. Exercises with fewer solutions exhibit slower and more erratic convergence, while changes in the closest valid solution indicate dynamic hypothesis revision. Our findings demonstrate how sequence-based analytics can uncover hidden dimensions of linguistic reasoning, offering a foundation for real-time scaffolding and teacher-facing tools in linguistically diverse classrooms.

</details>


### [424] [ClinConsensus: A Consensus-Based Benchmark for Evaluating Chinese Medical LLMs across Difficulty Levels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02097)
*Xiang Zheng,Han Li,Wenjie Luo,Weiqi Zhai,Yiyuan Li,Chuanmiao Yan,Tianyi Tang,Yubo Ma,Kexin Yang,Dayiheng Liu,Hu Wei,Bing Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了ClinConsensus，一个由临床专家策划并验证的中文医疗大模型评测基准，覆盖了完整的医疗流程和多种复杂任务，用于更真实地评估大模型在医疗场景下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的医疗大模型评测基准缺乏开放性、纵深结构和反映实际临床工作流程的复杂性，难以满足评估真实医疗场景中大模型能力的需要。

Method: 作者开发了ClinConsensus基准，包含2500个涵盖36个医学专科、12种常见任务且难度递增的开放式案例。采用基于评分标准的评价体系和双评审（高能力大模型+本地微调模型），并引入临床适用一致性分数CACS@k以提升评估可靠性。

Result: 通过ClinConsensus对多种主流大模型进行系统评测，发现不同模型在任务主题、护理阶段和专业领域表现差异显著，尤其在推理、循证和随访能力等方面存在较大差异，治疗方案制定仍是瓶颈。

Conclusion: ClinConsensus为医疗大模型的真实世界评估提供了更可靠和扩展性强的基准，有助于推动更健壮、临床可用的大模型研发，并加速其在实际医疗场景的落地。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to health management, showing promise across disease prevention, clinical decision-making, and long-term care. However, existing medical benchmarks remain largely static and task-isolated, failing to capture the openness, longitudinal structure, and safety-critical complexity of real-world clinical workflows. We introduce ClinConsensus, a Chinese medical benchmark curated, validated, and quality-controlled by clinical experts. ClinConsensus comprises 2500 open-ended cases spanning the full continuum of care--from prevention and intervention to long-term follow-up--covering 36 medical specialties, 12 common clinical task types, and progressively increasing levels of complexity. To enable reliable evaluation of such complex scenarios, we adopt a rubric-based grading protocol and propose the Clinically Applicable Consistency Score (CACS@k). We further introduce a dual-judge evaluation framework, combining a high-capability LLM-as-judge with a distilled, locally deployable judge model trained via supervised fine-tuning, enabling scalable and reproducible evaluation aligned with physician judgment. Using ClinConsensus, we conduct a comprehensive assessment of several leading LLMs and reveal substantial heterogeneity across task themes, care stages, and medical specialties. While top-performing models achieve comparable overall scores, they differ markedly in reasoning, evidence use, and longitudinal follow-up capabilities, and clinically actionable treatment planning remains a key bottleneck. We release ClinConsensus as an extensible benchmark to support the development and evaluation of medical LLMs that are robust, clinically grounded, and ready for real-world deployment.

</details>


### [425] [Recursive Think-Answer Process for LLMs and VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02099)
*Byung-Kwan Lee,Youngchae Chee,Yong Man Ro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了R-TAP（递归思考-回答过程）方法，通过引入置信度生成器和奖励机制，使得模型能在多轮迭代中不断优化答案，从而超越单次推理的限制，并在LLMs和VLMs上取得更优表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Think-Answer类推理模型（如DeepSeek-R1）依赖单次推理，容易出现输出错误和自反性错误（如“Ooops!”表达）。因此亟需高效方法，提升模型的推理准确性和一致性。

Method: 提出R-TAP递归思考-回答流程：模型每一轮输出答案后由置信度生成器评估当前答案的准确性，再决定是否继续迭代优化。奖励函数包括“递归置信度提升奖励”和“最终答案置信度奖励”，引导模型朝更精准的方向反复自我修正。

Result: R-TAP方法在大语言模型和视觉-语言模型上均优于原始单次推理方法。同时，R-TAP大幅减少了模型输出“Ooops!”等自我反省的表达，推理更加稳定且速度加快。

Conclusion: R-TAP方法展现出优化AI模型推理过程的潜力与效率，有望为未来更高效和精细的推理方法奠定基础。

Abstract: Think-Answer reasoners such as DeepSeek-R1 have made notable progress by leveraging interpretable internal reasoning. However, despite the frequent presence of self-reflective cues like "Oops!", they remain vulnerable to output errors during single-pass inference. To address this limitation, we propose an efficient Recursive Think-Answer Process (R-TAP) that enables models to engage in iterative reasoning cycles and generate more accurate answers, going beyond conventional single-pass approaches. Central to this approach is a confidence generator that evaluates the certainty of model responses and guides subsequent improvements. By incorporating two complementary rewards-Recursively Confidence Increase Reward and Final Answer Confidence Reward-we show that R-TAP-enhanced models consistently outperform conventional single-pass methods for both large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). Moreover, by analyzing the frequency of "Oops"-like expressions in model responses, we find that R-TAP-applied models exhibit significantly fewer self-reflective patterns, resulting in more stable and faster inference-time reasoning. We hope R-TAP pave the way evolving into efficient and elaborated methods to refine the reasoning processes of future AI.

</details>


### [426] [LLMs as Strategic Actors: Behavioral Alignment, Risk Calibration, and Argumentation Framing in Geopolitical Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02128)
*Veronika Solopova,Viktoria Skorik,Maksym Tereshchenko,Alina Haidun,Ostap Vykhopen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文评估了六种主流大语言模型（LLM）在地缘政治危机模拟中的决策行为，并与人类表现进行对比。结果表明，LLM初期决策接近人类，但随着模拟进行存在明显分歧，且偏向规范性与合作性推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然LLM越来越多地被作为战略决策代理投入使用，但其在结构化地缘政治环境下的行为尚缺乏系统性研究。作者希望评估LLM在实际危机情境中的表现，对比其与人类决策的异同，探寻LLM在国际关系推理中的优缺点。

Method: 论文设置了四种真实世界危机模拟场景，要求六种主流LLM按照预设选项做多轮决策并解释其理由。同时收集来自人类参与者的决策数据，通过决策选择的对齐度、风险校准（行动严厉程度）及论证框架（结合国际关系理论）进行对比分析。

Result: LLM在模拟初期的决策行为与人类较为一致，但随着多轮推进，两者逐渐分化，LLM展现出各自独特的行为特征和策略变化。所有模型在决策解释中基本采用以稳定、协作和风险规避为核心的规范—合作性推理，缺乏对抗性思维。

Conclusion: 主流LLM能在地缘政治危机模拟中初步模拟人类决策，但在长期场景及复杂博弈中表现出明显差异。它们倾向于采取更合作、稳定的策略，说明在战略环境中，现有LLM模型的对抗性理解与行为能力有限。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as agents in strategic decision environments, yet their behavior in structured geopolitical simulations remains under-researched. We evaluate six popular state-of-the-art LLMs alongside results from human results across four real-world crisis simulation scenarios, requiring models to select predefined actions and justify their decisions across multiple rounds. We compare models to humans in action alignment, risk calibration through chosen actions' severity, and argumentative framing grounded in international relations theory. Results show that models approximate human decision patterns in base simulation rounds but diverge over time, displaying distinct behavioural profiles and strategy updates. LLM explanations for chosen actions across all models exhibit a strong normative-cooperative framing centered on stability, coordination, and risk mitigation, with limited adversarial reasoning.

</details>


### [427] [LongRLVR: Long-Context Reinforcement Learning Requires Verifiable Context Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02146)
*Guanzheng Chen,Michael Qizhe Shieh,Lidong Bing*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的长上下文强化学习方法LongRLVR，通过增加对上下文证据选择的密集奖励，显著提升了大语言模型在长文本理解与推理任务中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）虽然提升了大语言模型的事实推理能力，但在长上下文任务中效果有限。其主要问题在于奖励过于稀疏，仅关注最终答案，无法有效指导模型识别并利用外部上下文信息。

Method: 作者证明了仅基于最终答案的奖励会导致梯度消失，从而影响模型学习。为解决这一问题，提出LongRLVR，在标准RLVR的基础上增加了对是否选择正确信息的密集可验证奖励。该方法为模型提供了更稳健的学习信号，有效引导其学习如何进行准确的上下文证据检索与推理。

Result: 在RULER-QA和LongBench v2等多个长上下文基准测试中，LongRLVR在Qwen和LLaMA等主流大模型上均显著优于标准RLVR。例如，14B参数模型在RULER-QA上的得分由73.17提升到88.90，在LongBench v2上的得分由39.8提升到46.5。

Conclusion: 本研究表明，显式奖励上下文信息筛选过程对于提升大语言模型在长上下文推理任务中的能力至关重要，是激发其完整推理潜力的有效策略。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) by optimizing them against factual outcomes. However, this paradigm falters in long-context scenarios, as its reliance on internal parametric knowledge is ill-suited for tasks requiring contextual grounding--the ability to find and reason over externally provided information. We identify a key reason for this failure: a reward based solely on the final answer is too sparse to effectively guide the model for identifying relevant evidence. We formally prove that the outcome-only reward leads to significant vanishing gradients for the context grounding process, rendering learning intractable. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce LongRLVR to augment the sparse answer reward with a dense and verifiable context reward. This auxiliary signal directly incentivizes the model for selecting the correct grounding information, providing a robust learning gradient that solves the underlying optimization challenge. We validate our method on challenging long-context benchmarks using Qwen and LLaMA models. LongRLVR consistently and significantly outperforms the standard RLVR across all models and benchmarks, e.g., boosting a 14B model's scores on RULER-QA from 73.17 to 88.90 and on LongBench v2 from 39.8 to 46.5. Our work demonstrates that explicitly rewarding the grounding process is a critical and effective strategy for unlocking the full reasoning potential of LLMs in long-context applications. Our code is available at https://github.com/real-absolute-AI/LongRLVR.

</details>


### [428] [Zero- and Few-Shot Named-Entity Recognition: Case Study and Dataset in the Crime Domain (CrimeNER)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02150)
*Miguel Lopez-Duran,Julian Fierrez,Aythami Morales,Daniel DeAlcala,Gonzalo Mancera,Javier Irigoyen,Ruben Tolosana,Oscar Delgado,Francisco Jurado,Alvaro Ortigosa*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了CrimeNER——一个专注于犯罪领域的零样本与小样本命名实体识别（NER）研究案例，并构建了包含1500余篇文档的犯罪实体识别数据库（CrimeNERdb），涵盖恐怖袭击与美国司法部新闻稿提取的文本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有通用犯罪场景下的有标注NER数据集严重不足，影响了执法机构在实际应用中高效、准确地提取关键信息。文章旨在填补这一空白，促进犯罪文本自动分析能力提升。

Method: 作者收集并人工标注了1500多篇与犯罪相关的公开报告和新闻稿，构建数据库，并定义了5种粗粒度和22种细粒度犯罪实体类型。研究在零样本和小样本场景下，采用主流NER模型及大型语言模型（LLMs）进行实验证明数据集与方法有效性。

Result: CrimeNERdb支持并提升了各类NER模型在犯罪文本领域的表现，尤其是在零样本、少样本情况下表现突出。实验展示了该数据集在多模型下的泛化和适应能力。

Conclusion: CrimeNERdb为犯罪领域下NER研究与实际应用提供了高质量数据资源，有助于推动法律文档自动化分析与执法信息提取技术进步。

Abstract: The extraction of critical information from crime-related documents is a crucial task for law enforcement agencies. Named-Entity Recognition (NER) can perform this task in extracting information about the crime, the criminal, or law enforcement agencies involved. However, there is a considerable lack of adequately annotated data on general real-world crime scenarios. To address this issue, we present CrimeNER, a case-study of Crime-related zero- and Few-Shot NER, and a general Crime-related Named-Entity Recognition database (CrimeNERdb) consisting of more than 1.5k annotated documents for the NER task extracted from public reports on terrorist attacks and the U.S. Department of Justice's press notes. We define 5 types of coarse crime entity and a total of 22 types of fine-grained entity. We address the quality of the case-study and the annotated data with experiments on Zero and Few-Shot settings with State-of-the-Art NER models as well as generalist and commonly used Large Language Models.

</details>


### [429] [Organizing, Orchestrating, and Benchmarking Agent Skills at Ecosystem Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02176)
*Hao Li,Chunjiang Mu,Jianhao Chen,Siyue Ren,Zhiyao Cui,Yiqun Zhang,Lei Bai,Shuyue Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出了AgentSkillOS，一个用于智能体技能生态系统管理与编排的框架，通过分层管理和DAG管道，高效调用大量技能以完成复杂任务。实验表明，该方法极大提升了技能调用效率和任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着Claude等智能体技能数量的激增，传统的平面管理和技能调用方法难以应对大规模、高复杂度的技能协同问题，需要新的机制实现高效发现、组合与管理。

Method: AgentSkillOS分为两阶段：（1）管理技能，将技能通过递归分类组织为能力树结构，提升发现和检索效率；（2）任务求解，利用有向无环图(DAG)将多个技能有序编排与执行。作者设计了包含30个涵盖5大类的多工件任务基准集，并用LLM双模型评价和Bradley-Terry模型做评分汇总。

Result: 在200至20万技能的大规模生态环境下，能力树检索能有效逼近理想（oracle）技能选择，DAG编排相较于平面调用显著提升了任务表现和结果质量。

Conclusion: 结构化的技能管理与编排是大规模多技能智能体高效表现的关键。AgentSkillOS为智能体技能生态系统的演进和规模化管理提供了实证基础和开源实现。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Claude agent skills has raised the central question of how to effectively leverage, manage, and scale the agent skill ecosystem. In this paper, we propose AgentSkillOS, the first principled framework for skill selection, orchestration, and ecosystem-level management. AgentSkillOS comprises two stages: (i) Manage Skills, which organizes skills into a capability tree via node-level recursive categorization for efficient discovery; and (ii) Solve Tasks, which retrieves, orchestrates, and executes multiple skills through DAG-based pipelines. To evaluate the agent's ability to invoke skills, we construct a benchmark of 30 artifact-rich tasks across five categories: data computation, document creation, motion video, visual design, and web interaction. We assess the quality of task outputs using LLM-based pairwise evaluation, and the results are aggregated via a Bradley-Terry model to produce unified quality scores. Experiments across three skill ecosystem scales (200 to 200K skills) show that tree-based retrieval effectively approximates oracle skill selection, and that DAG-based orchestration substantially outperforms native flat invocation even when given the identical skill set.Our findings confirm that structured composition is the key to unlocking skill potential. Our GitHub repository is available at:https://github.com/ynulihao/AgentSkillOS.

</details>


### [430] [Reasoning Core: A Scalable Procedural Data Generation Suite for Symbolic Pre-training and Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02208)
*Valentin Lacombe,Valentin Quesnel,Damien Sileo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了Reasoning Core，一个可扩展的自动生成可验证符号推理数据的工具套件，涵盖多种正式领域。通过引入高质量的推理数据，提升大语言模型的推理能力，有效弥补通用语料库的不足，并验证了对下游推理任务和语言建模质量的双重提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在符号推理方面受限于预训练语料库的数据分布和覆盖范围。市面上的生成工具大多基于固定模板，无法满足大规模、多样化的推理训练需求，因此需要一种能够高效、灵活生成高质量、多样化推理数据的方法。

Method: 作者提出Reasoning Core，可在规划（PDDL）、一阶逻辑、文法解析与生成、因果推理（贝叶斯网络）、方程组等五类核心正式推理领域自动生成问题。每个任务配有外部验证器确保数据准确，支持可控难度和推理过程导出，适用于有监督学习和强化学习。

Result: 实验表明，将Reasoning Core生成的数据混入预训练过程中，可以提升模型的推理能力，并且语言建模的整体表现保持或略有提升。而且，这些生成任务对如GPT-5等最前沿的模型也仍具挑战性，零样本测试显示模型在这些任务上的表现并不完美。

Conclusion: Reasoning Core为大模型推理能力训练提供了高质量且可扩展的数据生成方案，开源实现有助于社区推动符号推理与通用人工智能的深度融合。

Abstract: Training on verifiable symbolic data is a promising way to expand the reasoning frontier of language models beyond what standard pre-training corpora provide. Yet existing procedural generators often rely on fixed puzzles or templates and do not deliver the distributional breadth needed at scale. We introduce Reasoning Core, a scalable suite that procedurally generates verifiable symbolic reasoning data across core formal domains: PDDL planning over randomized domains, first-order logic with equality, context-free grammar parsing and generation, causal reasoning over random Bayesian networks, and systems of equations. Each task is paired with an external solver for rigorous verification and admits continuous difficulty control for curriculum design. Examples can optionally include solver-derived reasoning traces, enabling supervised training from the earliest pre-training stages, and the same interface provides verifiable reward functions for reinforcement learning. Our experiments show that mixing Reasoning Core data into pre-training improves downstream reasoning while preserving, or slightly improving, language modeling quality. Zero-shot evaluations confirm these tasks challenge frontier models such as GPT-5. The code and data are publicly available under the MIT license.

</details>


### [431] [MemeIntel: Explainable Detection of Propagandistic and Hateful Memes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16612)
*Mohamed Bayan Kmainasi,Abul Hasnat,Md Arid Hasan,Ali Ezzat Shahroor,Firoj Alam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了MemeXplain，这是首个涵盖阿拉伯语宣传表情包和英语仇恨表情包、注重解释生成的大规模数据集，并提出多阶段优化方法提升分类和解释性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 绝大多数关于多模态内容的研究集中于自动检测错误信息、仇恨言论等标签，但对“标签检测+解释生成”联合建模关注有限，且两者同时训练时，分类性能易下降。

Method: 作者构建了MemeXplain数据集，针对多模态表情包中的解释需求。方法层面，采用多阶段优化方法，并在视觉-语言模型（VLMs）上训练该任务，分别处理标签检测与解释生成。

Result: 多阶段优化方法显著提升了标签检测与解释生成的质量。在ArMeme（阿拉伯语）数据集上准确率提升约1.4%，在Hateful Memes（英语）数据集上提升约2.2%，超越当前最先进方法。

Conclusion: MemeXplain数据集与方法共同推动了多模态内容理解的前沿，兼顾标签检测与解释生成，相关资源已开源，有助于后续领域研究和实际内容审核。

Abstract: The proliferation of multimodal content on social media presents significant challenges in understanding and moderating complex, context-dependent issues such as misinformation, hate speech, and propaganda. While efforts have been made to develop resources and propose new methods for automatic detection, limited attention has been given to jointly modeling label detection and the generation of explanation-based rationales, which often leads to degraded classification performance when trained simultaneously. To address this challenge, we introduce MemeXplain, an explanation-enhanced dataset for propagandistic memes in Arabic and hateful memes in English, making it the first large-scale resource for these tasks. To solve these tasks, we propose a multi-stage optimization approach and train Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Our results show that this strategy significantly improves both label detection and explanation generation quality over the base model, outperforming the current state-of-the-art with an absolute improvement of ~1.4% (Acc) on ArMeme and ~2.2% (Acc) on Hateful Memes. For reproducibility and future research, we aim to make the MemeXplain dataset and scripts publicly available (https://github.com/MohamedBayan/MemeIntel).

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [432] [Beyond Static Instruction: A Multi-agent AI Framework for Adaptive Augmented Reality Robot Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00016)
*Nicolas Leins,Jana Gonnermann-Müller,Malte Teichmann,Sebastian Pokutta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文提出结合增强现实（AR）与多智能体AI框架，用于工业机器人培训，实现从静态可视化向智能动态教学的转变。初步AR界面试验展现高易用性，但任务表现因学习者差异存在较大波动。作者提出未来整合多模态输入和大语言模型，实现针对个体自适应的机器人教学。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AR在工业机器人培训中具有强大可视化优势，但现有界面无法根据不同学习者的认知差异调整教学内容，导致培训效果受限。为提升机器人教学个性化与智能化水平，作者希望突破静态界面局限。

Method: 1）开发初始AR机器人培训应用并评估其可用性（36名参与者完成分拣任务）；2）提出多智能体框架，利用多模态数据（语音、生理、机器人操作等）驱动，与自主LLM智能体联动，实时调整学习场景。

Result: 用户测试显示AR界面整体易用，但在完成任务时长和表现上受用户特征影响明显，凸显静态界面难以满足多样化需求。

Conclusion: 静态AR虽有效但不足以照顾个体差异。引入以多智能体和LLM为核心的自适应架构，有望实现对不同学习者动态支持和优化机器人培训体验。

Abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) offers powerful visualization capabilities for industrial robot training, yet current interfaces remain predominantly static, failing to account for learners' diverse cognitive profiles. In this paper, we present an AR application for robot training and propose a multi-agent AI framework for future integration that bridges the gap between static visualization and pedagogical intelligence. We report on the evaluation of the baseline AR interface with 36 participants performing a robotic pick-and-place task. While overall usability was high, notable disparities in task duration and learner characteristics highlighted the necessity for dynamic adaptation. To address this, we propose a multi-agent framework that orchestrates multiple components to perform complex preprocessing of multimodal inputs (e.g., voice, physiology, robot data) and adapt the AR application to the learner's needs. By utilizing autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents, the proposed system would dynamically adapt the learning environment based on advanced LLM reasoning in real-time.

</details>


### [433] [A User Study on the Suitability of Teleoperation Interfaces for Primitive Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00020)
*Jun Aoki,Shunki Itadera*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文比较了3D鼠标与VR控制器在操作6自由度机械臂进行按钮和旋钮任务时的表现。结果显示，VR控制器在按钮任务表现更好，3D鼠标在旋钮任务更优且负担较低，强调了设计遥操作界面时应考虑任务的主要运动形式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前遥操作机械臂的界面多样，但针对不同任务特性进行系统性界面对比研究较少。实际应用中界面特性与任务表现关系不明，需要明确不同界面适配不同任务的优势。

Method: 本研究让23名参与者使用3D鼠标和VR控制器分别完成机械臂按钮按压与旋钮旋转任务。每轮实验持续3分钟，记录操作次数及NASA-TLX工作负荷评分，对比不同界面在两种任务中的性能差异。

Result: 数据显示，使用VR控制器进行按钮任务表现优于3D鼠标，而3D鼠标在旋钮任务中效率更高且操作负担更小。

Conclusion: 遥操作界面的设计需依据具体任务的主导运动形式（如直线或旋转），不同界面在不同任务上具有明显性能优劣，选择合适界面能有效提升机械臂遥操作效率和用户体验。

Abstract: The application of teleoperation to control robotic arms has been widely explored, and user-friendly teleoperation systems have been studied for facilitating higher performance and lower operational burden. To investigate the dominant factors in a practical teleoperation system, this study focused on the characteristics of an interface used to operate a robotic arm. The usability of an interface depends on the characteristics of the manipulation tasks to be completed; however, systematic comparisons of different interfaces across different tasks remain limited. In this study, we compared two widely used teleoperation interfaces, a 3D mouse and a VR controller, for two simple yet broadly applicable tasks with a six-degree-of-freedom (6DoF) robotic arm: repetitively pushing buttons and rotating knobs. Participants (N = 23) controlled a robotic arm with 6DoF to push buttons and rotate knobs as many times as possible in 3-minute trials. Each trial was followed by a NASA-TLX workload rating. The results showed a clear connection between the interface and task performance: the VR controller yielded higher performance for pushing buttons, whereas the 3D mouse performed better and was less demanding for knob rotation. These findings highlight the importance of considering dominant motion primitives of the task when designing practical teleoperation interfaces.

</details>


### [434] [Designing Social Robots with Ethical, User-Adaptive Explainability in the Era of Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00102)
*Fethiye Irmak Dogan,Alva Markelius,Hatice Gunes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文探讨了基础模型（如大型语言模型）在社交机器人中的应用，强调了对用户适应性和伦理可解释性的核心地位，并提出了改进建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着基础模型广泛嵌入社交机器人，这些机器人面临着对不同用户提供通用解释策略（即“放之四海而皆准”的解释）的局限性，尤其是在模型基于庞大且不透明的数据集训练的情况下，伦理和解释性问题日益突出。

Method: 文章首先梳理了当前可解释性和伦理上的挑战，然后提出了四项针对社交机器人解释策略的改进建议：注重用户适应性、考虑多模态、参与式共设计，以及以更小且公平的数据集为基础。

Result: 通过一个由LLM驱动的社交助理机器人案例，展示了这些建议在实际敏感领域的具体应用方式。

Conclusion: 作者呼吁行业在设计以基础模型为核心的社交机器人时，应高度重视个性化、伦理化的可解释性设计，以提升安全性和用户信任。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly embedded in social robots, mediating not only what they say and do but also how they adapt to users over time. This shift renders traditional ``one-size-fits-all'' explanation strategies especially problematic: generic justifications are now wrapped around behaviour produced by models trained on vast, heterogeneous, and opaque datasets. We argue that ethical, user-adapted explainability must be treated as a core design objective for foundation-model-driven social robotics. We first identify open challenges around explainability and ethical concerns that arise when both adaptation and explanation are delegated to foundation models. Building on this analysis, we propose four recommendations for moving towards user-adapted, modality-aware, and co-designed explanation strategies grounded in smaller, fairer datasets. An illustrative use case of an LLM-driven socially assistive robot demonstrates how these recommendations might be instantiated in a sensitive, real-world domain.

</details>


### [435] [Autonomous Block Assembly for Boom Cranes with Passive Joint Dynamics: Integrated Vision MPC Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00103)
*Gerald Ebmer,Minh Nhat Vu,Tobias Glück,Wolfgang Kemmetmüller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一套无人化控制框架，结合视觉感知、避障轨迹规划及非线性模型预测控制，实现吊臂起重机在装配建筑构件时精准自主作业。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 吊臂起重机因钩端有被动关节，会出现钟摆状摆动，导致建筑部件难以精准放置。提高自动化装配精度和效率，降低人工干预需求是亟需解决的问题。

Method: 结合视觉实时定位、基于B样条曲线的避障轨迹规划（可在CPU实时生成）、以及非线性模型预测控制，实现吊臂端拾取、避障、精准放置等动作。通过快速搭建的实验平台进行了验证。

Result: 在实验平台上，实现了自主堆叠、避障装配，并显著抑制吊臂端的晃动，使稳定时间比无控时缩短一个数量级，验证了方案的实时性和有效性。

Conclusion: 集成的视觉-规划-控制框架能够在建筑吊臂起重装配自动化任务中实时运行，有效消除摆动，极大提升了作业的精度与效率，展现了工程实用前景。

Abstract: This paper presents an autonomous control framework for articulated boom cranes performing prefabricated block assembly in construction environments. The key challenge addressed is precise placement control under passive joint dynamics that cause pendulum-like sway, complicating the accurate positioning of building components. Our integrated approach combines real-time vision-based pose estimation of building blocks, collision-aware B-spline path planning, and nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) to achieve autonomous pickup, placement, and obstacle-avoidance assembly operations. The framework is validated on a laboratory-scale testbed that emulates crane kinematics and passive dynamics while enabling rapid experimentation. The collision-aware planner generates feasible B-spline references in real-time on CPU hardware with anytime performance, while the NMPC controller actively suppresses passive joint sway and tracks the planned trajectory under continuous vision feedback. Experimental results demonstrate autonomous block stacking and obstacle-avoidance assembly, with sway damping reducing settling times by more than an order of magnitude compared to uncontrolled passive dynamics, confirming the real-time feasibility of the integrated approach for construction automation.

</details>


### [436] [SurgFusion-Net: Diversified Adaptive Multimodal Fusion Network for Surgical Skill Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00108)
*Runlong He,Freweini M. Tesfai,Matthew W. E. Boal,Nazir Sirajudeen,Dimitrios Anastasiou,Jialang Xu,Mobarak I. Hoque,Philip J. Edwards,John D. Kelly,Ashwin Sridhar,Abdolrahim Kadkhodamohammadi,Dhivya Chandrasekaran,Matthew J. Clarkson,Danail Stoyanov,Nader Francis,Evangelos B. Mazomenos*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的多模态手术技能评估方法（SurgFusion-Net和DRA），并发布了两个首次公开的真实临床数据集，显著提升评估准确性，扩展了现有主要基于实验室和RGB视频的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人辅助手术自动评估严重依赖单一模态（RGB视频），仅在实验环境下应用，难以应对真实临床环境的复杂性。多模态融合的有效方法及真实临床数据的匮乏，限制了手术技能评估的实用性和广泛应用。

Method: 提出了SurgFusion-Net网络和Divergence Regulated Attention（DRA）融合策略，将RGB视频、光流和工具分割三种模态数据，根据手术语境自适应融合，并通过多头注意力机制增强模态间多样性。此外，公布了两个含注释的新临床数据集RAH-skill和RARP-skill，用以系统评测方法有效性。

Result: 所提方法在JIGSAWS基准集、RAH-skill及RARP-skill数据集上相较于已有方法取得更高的相关性评估分数（SCC），例如在JIGSAWS任务上LOS0提升0.02，LOUO提升0.04，在RAH-skill和RARP-skill数据集分别提升0.0538和0.0493。

Conclusion: SurgFusion-Net结合DRA的多模态融合机制能够更好地适应真实临床场景下的手术行为评估，优于现有主流方法，并为后续面向实际应用的研究提供了规模化注释数据和方法基础。

Abstract: Robotic-assisted surgery (RAS) is established in clinical practice, and automated surgical skill assessment utilizing multimodal data offers transformative potential for surgical analytics and education. However, developing effective multimodal methods remains challenging due to the task complexity, limited annotated datasets and insufficient techniques for cross-modal information fusion. Existing state-of-the-art relies exclusively on RGB video and only applies on dry-lab settings, failing to address the significant domain gap between controlled simulation and real clinical cases, where the surgical environment together with camera and tissue motion introduce substantial complexities. This work introduces SurgFusion-Net and Divergence Regulated Attention (DRA), an innovative fusion strategy for multimodal surgical skill assessment. We contribute two first-of-their-kind clinical datasets: the RAH-skill dataset containing 279,691 RGB frames from 37 videos of Robot-assisted Hysterectomy (RAH), and the RARP-skill dataset containing 70,661 RGB frames from 33 videos of Robot-Assisted Radical Prostatectomy (RARP). Both datasets include M-GEARS skill annotations, corresponding optical flow and tool segmentation masks. DRA incorporates adaptive dual attention and diversity-promoting multi-head attention to fuse multimodal information, from three modalities, based on surgical context, enhancing assessment accuracy and reliability. Validated on the JIGSAWS benchmark, RAH-skill, and RARP-skill datasets, our approach outperforms recent baselines with SCC improvements of 0.02 in LOSO, 0.04 in LOUO across JIGSAWS tasks, and 0.0538 and 0.0493 gains on RAH-skill and RARP-skill, respectively.

</details>


### [437] [Learning Physics from Pretrained Video Models: A Multimodal Continuous and Sequential World Interaction Models for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00110)
*Zijian Song,Qichang Li,Sihan Qin,Yuhao Chen,Tianshui Chen,Liang Lin,Guangrun Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PhysGen利用预训练的视频生成模型作为物理模拟器，提出了统一视频与动作的表示，实现了无需专门动作预训练的通用机器人操作策略，实验效果优于主流方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前机器人强化学习的数据稀缺，导致难以训练高度泛化的操作策略。为弥补这一短板，作者尝试借助视频领域大规模预训练模型，将其迁移用于机器人操作中，从而释放预训练物理知识的价值。

Method: 提出PhysGen框架，将预训练视频生成模型视为物理模拟器，采用多模态连续表示方法，将视频与机器人动作以共享物理标记统一。加入因果掩码、逆运动学、L-MTP（多步预测）和KV缓存，提升学习效率和性能。

Result: 在Libero和ManiSkill基准测试中，PhysGen超越OpenVLA和WorldVLA，分别提升13.8%和8.8%。在现实世界实验中，无需动作预训练，PhysGen在操作难度大的任务（如抓取透明物体）也表现出色，达到类似大型动作预训练模型的效果。

Conclusion: PhysGen模型有效地从视频生成模型中迁移隐含的物理直觉，显著提升机器人的泛化操作能力，为基于视频预训练加速机器人操控学习提供了新方向。

Abstract: The scarcity of large-scale robotic data has motivated the repurposing of foundation models from other modalities for policy learning. In this work, we introduce PhysGen (Learning Physics from Pretrained Video Generation Models), a scalable continuous and sequential world interaction framework that leverages autoregressive video generation to solve robotic manipulation tasks. By treating the pretrained video model as a proxy for a physics simulator, PhysGen models the dynamic interplay between the external environment and robot actions. We introduce a multimodal continuous representation that unifies video and action into shared physical tokens, bridging the gap between discrete video generation and continuous robotic control. This approach enables the seamless transfer of implicit physical knowledge-such as object permanence and dynamics-from video pretraining to downstream manipulation.To ensure efficient convergence, we incorporate causal masking, inverse kinematics, Lookahead Multi-Token Prediction (L-MTP), and key-value (KV) caching. Experimental results on the Libero and ManiSkill benchmarks demonstrate that PhysGen consistently outperforms robust baselines, surpassing OpenVLA and WorldVLA by margins of 13.8% and 8.8%, respectively. Notably, in real-world scenarios, PhysGen matches the performance of large-scale action-pretrained models like $π_0$ without requiring prior action-specific pretraining, demonstrating superior capability in physically complex tasks such as grasping transparent objects. These findings validate the potential of extracting physical intuition from pretrained video generators to facilitate generalizable robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [438] [PEPA: a Persistently Autonomous Embodied Agent with Personalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00117)
*Kaige Liu,Yang Li,Lijun Zhu,Weinan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了PEPA三层认知架构，使机器人通过性格驱动自主设定目标，实现长期自主行为，突破了以往对人工设定任务的依赖。经过实际部署和多性格原型实验验证，展示了其在真实环境中的持续自主能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的智能体在实际应用中多依赖外部事先设定的目标和任务，这种依赖严重限制了它们在复杂、动态、无结构环境下的长期自主工作能力，因为难以实现持续的人类干预。为了解决这个瓶颈，作者受到生物体以性格和内部动机自发组织行为的启发，探索如何借助“性格”作为一种内在机制，实现机器人的持续自主演化能力。

Method: 作者提出了一种新的三层认知架构——PEPA，包括三个互补交互的系统：Sys3（最高级）会根据个体性格生成目标，并通过记忆和反思调整目标；Sys2负责推理和将目标转化为具体的行动计划；Sys1负责感知与执行，将机器人的动作落地，并记录感知和行动结果。该架构被部署到四足机器人上，在实际多楼层办公楼环境中运行。通过引入五种性格原型，机器人在无固定任务指令下自主行动、探索环境并根据自身性格进行目标优先级分配。

Result: 实验结果表明，无需外部预设任务，机器人能够长期自主运行，在用户请求和自身动机之间做决策，表现出与五种性格原型一致、稳定的行为倾向。定量分析支持了性格驱动架构能显著提升机器人的持续自主性。

Conclusion: 性格驱动的认知架构为智能体实现持续自主提供了新路径，赋予机器人类似生物体的自我组织和动机生成机制，有效克服了依赖外部任务设定的局限，推动了自持化智能体技术的发展与实际落地。

Abstract: Living organisms exhibit persistent autonomy through internally generated goals and self-sustaining behavioral organization, yet current embodied agents remain driven by externally scripted objectives. This dependence on predefined task specifications limits their capacity for long-term deployment in dynamic, unstructured environments where continuous human intervention is impractical. We propose that personality traits provide an intrinsic organizational principle for achieving persistent autonomy. Analogous to genotypic biases shaping biological behavioral tendencies, personalities enable agents to autonomously generate goals and sustain behavioral evolution without external supervision. To realize this, we develop PEPA, a three-layer cognitive architecture that operates through three interacting systems: Sys3 autonomously synthesizes personality-aligned goals and refines them via episodic memory and daily self-reflection; Sys2 performs deliberative reasoning to translate goals into executable action plans; Sys1 grounds the agent in sensorimotor interaction, executing actions and recording experiences. We validate the framework through real-world deployment on a quadruped robot in a multi-floor office building. Operating without reliance on fixed task specifications, the robot autonomously arbitrates between user requests and personality-driven motivations, navigating elevators and exploring environments accordingly. Quantitative analysis across five distinct personality prototypes demonstrates stable, trait-aligned behaviors. The results confirm that personality-driven cognitive architectures enable sustained autonomous operation characteristic of persistent embodied systems. Code and demo videos are available at https://sites.google.com/view/pepa-persistent/.

</details>


### [439] [Multiview Progress Prediction of Robot Activities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00151)
*Elena Zoppellari,Federico Becattini,Marco Fiorucci,Lamberto Ballan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多视角架构，用于机器人操作任务中的动作进展预测，并在Mobile ALOHA上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人逐渐进入与人类协作的场景，理解正在进行的动作进展对于安全和高效作业至关重要。然而，现有方法很少关注动作进展建模，且单一视角很难处理机器人本体动作中的自遮挡问题，导致识别效果受限。

Method: 提出了一种多视角的神经网络架构，通过多个摄像头捕捉机器人操作过程，联合分析各视角信息从而提升动作进展预测的准确性。

Result: 在Mobile ALOHA平台上的实验表明，所提多视角方法优于传统单视角方案，在动作进展预测任务中表现出更高的准确性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 多视角建模显著提升了机器人动作进展预测的性能，为后续协作与自主移动提供了感知基础，方法具有实际应用潜力。

Abstract: For robots to operate effectively and safely alongside humans, they must be able to understand the progress of ongoing actions. This ability, known as action progress prediction, is critical for tasks ranging from timely assistance to autonomous decision-making. However, modeling action progression in robotics has often been overlooked. Moreover, a single camera may be insufficient for understanding robot's ego-actions, as self-occlusion can significantly hinder perception and model performance. In this paper, we propose a multi-view architecture for action progress prediction in robot manipulation tasks. Experiments on Mobile ALOHA demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [440] [Trust in Autonomous Human--Robot Collaboration: Effects of Responsive Interaction Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00154)
*Shauna Heron,Meng Cheng Lau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了不同交互策略下，全自主社交机器人在与人面对面协作时对信任的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管信任在人机协作中非常重要，但很少有研究考察在完全自主（无人工遥控或预设修正）的条件下，信任是如何形成的。该研究旨在通过模拟真实自主机器人面对面的互动情境，分析交互策略对用户信任的塑造作用。

Method: 参与者与一个可移动社交机器人完成多阶段协作任务。机器人完全自主地管理对话、情感推断和任务推进。实验设置了两种交互策略：一种是响应式策略，机器人会根据推断的互动状态主动调整对话和帮助；另一种是中立反应式策略，机器人只在被询问时提供与任务直接相关的回应。

Result: 在交流条件良好的情况下，采用响应式策略的机器人能显著提升用户在互动后的信任感，尽管两组在任务准确性上无显著差异。敏感性分析显示，与可靠性评价相比，信任的情感和体验成分对交流故障更敏感。当语言交流恶化时，响应策略带来的信任提升效应减少，用户对机器人协作能力的评价也变得不那么明确。

Conclusion: 自主人机交互中的信任产生于交互过程层面的动态变化，并受到通讯可行性的限制。因此，设计互动型机器人时应在实际自主条件下评估信任机制。

Abstract: Trust plays a central role in human--robot collaboration, yet its formation is rarely examined under the constraints of fully autonomous interaction. This pilot study investigated how interaction policy influences trust during in-person collaboration with a social robot operating without Wizard-of-Oz control or scripted repair. Participants completed a multi-stage collaborative task with a mobile robot that autonomously managed spoken-language dialogue, affect inference, and task progression. Two interaction policies were compared: a responsive policy, in which the robot proactively adapted its dialogue and assistance based on inferred interaction state, and a neutral, reactive policy, in which the robot provided only direct, task-relevant responses when prompted. Responsive interaction was associated with significantly higher post-interaction trust under viable communication conditions, despite no reliable differences in overall task accuracy. Sensitivity analyses indicated that affective and experiential components of trust were more sensitive to communication breakdown than evaluative judgments of reliability, and that as language-mediated interaction degraded, the trust advantage associated with responsiveness attenuated and ratings became less clearly interpretable as calibrated evaluations of collaborative competence. These findings suggest that trust in autonomous human--robot interaction emerges from process-level interaction dynamics and operates within constraints imposed by communication viability, highlighting the importance of evaluating trust under real autonomy conditions when designing interactive robotic systems.

</details>


### [441] [EgoMoD: Predicting Global Maps of Dynamics from Local Egocentric Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00167)
*Iacopo Catalano,David Morilla-Cabello,Jorge Pena-Queralta,Eduardo Montijano*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出EgoMoD方法，从短暂的第一视角视频直接预测动态地图，提升机器人在动态环境中的全局导航预测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动态地图（MoDs）的构建依赖长期全局观测，不适合实际机器人仅有局部观测的场景。本研究旨在让机器人仅用自身采集的短时局部视频也能预测全局动态趋势，从而提前规划，避免单纯反应式行为。

Method: EgoMoD方法利用结合视频和位姿的神经网络结构，从短时间局部相机视频输入中学习推断整个环境的运动趋势，训练时以外部观测计算的MoDs作为先验监督信号。这样，机器人本地观测信号可用于全局动态预测。

Result: 在大规模模拟环境中，EgoMoD在受限可观测性下依然准确预测出未来动态地图。同时，实拍图像实验验证了模型的零-shot可迁移性，可直接应用于真实系统。

Conclusion: EgoMoD使机器人仅依赖自身局部视角观测即可实现动态全局环境预测，为动态场景下的前瞻性导航提供了新的技术路径。

Abstract: Efficient navigation in dynamic environments requires anticipating how motion patterns evolve beyond the robot's immediate perceptual range, enabling preemptive rather than purely reactive planning in crowded scenes. Maps of Dynamics (MoDs) offer a structured representation of motion tendencies in space useful for long-term global planning, but constructing them traditionally requires global environment observations over extended periods of time. We introduce EgoMoD, the first approach that learns to predict future MoDs directly from short egocentric video clips collected during robot operation. Our method learns to infer environment-wide motion tendencies from local dynamic cues using a video- and pose-conditioned architecture trained with MoDs computed from external observations as privileged supervision, allowing local observations to serve as predictive signals of global motion structure. Thanks to this, we offer the capacity to forecast future motion dynamics over the whole environment rather than merely extend past patterns in the robot's field of view. Experiments in large simulated environments show that EgoMoD accurately predicts future MoDs under limited observability, while evaluation with real images showcases its zero-shot transferability to real systems.

</details>


### [442] [Embedding Morphology into Transformers for Cross-Robot Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00182)
*Kei Suzuki,Jing Liu,Ye Wang,Chiori Hori,Matthew Brand,Diego Romeres,Toshiaki Koike-Akino*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对多种机器人体态都能表现良好的“跨机器人策略学习”方法，通过结构化方式将机器人形态信息注入Transformer策略模型，在多个体态实验中显著优于传统无体态注入的VLA模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于Transformer的策略模型通常不考虑机器人的具体体态（形态结构），只依赖视觉和观察数据，导致迁移性和鲁棒性较差，难以适应或泛化到不同机器人结构，也可能限制在单一体态下的性能。

Method: 方法包括三项创新：1. 用“运动学token”将动作在不同关节间分解，并通过按关节分块时间压缩序列；2. 在自注意机制中加入“拓扑感知偏置”，将运动学拓扑作为归纳偏置引导信息沿关节拓扑流动；3. 联合每个关节的描述特征，提升对拓扑以外关节语义的表达能力。

Result: 在多种不同体态的机器人环境下，结构化整合体态信息的方法相较于普通VLA基线，均获得了更高的任务表现和更好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 结构化地将机器人运动学和拓扑信息引入Transformer决策模型，能够大幅提升策略在单一及多体态中的性能和鲁棒性，为跨机器人策略学习开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Cross-robot policy learning -- training a single policy to perform well across multiple embodiments -- remains a central challenge in robot learning. Transformer-based policies, such as vision-language-action (VLA) models, are typically embodiment-agnostic and must infer kinematic structure purely from observations, which can reduce robustness across embodiments and even limit performance within a single embodiment. We propose an embodiment-aware transformer policy that injects morphology via three mechanisms: (1) kinematic tokens that factorize actions across joints and compress time through per-joint temporal chunking; (2) a topology-aware attention bias that encodes kinematic topology as an inductive bias in self-attention, encouraging message passing along kinematic edges; and (3) joint-attribute conditioning that augments topology with per-joint descriptors to capture semantics beyond connectivity. Across a range of embodiments, this structured integration consistently improves performance over a vanilla pi0.5 VLA baseline, indicating improved robustness both within an embodiment and across embodiments.

</details>


### [443] [Modeling PWM-Time-SOC Interaction in a Simulated Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00319)
*Vidyut Pradeep,Shirantha Welikala*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文通过结合物理建模和数据驱动方法，提出了一种可预测机器人电池电量(SOC)随时间和PWM占空比变化的模型，有助于实现能量感知的自主路径规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主机器人需要准确预测电池电量（SOC）以确保运动计划不会耗尽电源。这对于延长工作时间和保证任务完成至关重要。

Method: 1. 基于模拟建立运动学模型，整合电机电气特性（如电阻、电感、反电动势、力矩常数）和机械动力学参数（如质量、阻力、滚动阻力、轮半径）。2. 模拟不同PWM占空比下的前进运动，生成SOC随时间变化的数据。3. 利用稀疏非线性动力学识别（SINDy）与最小二乘回归，获得统一的非线性SOC预测模型SOC(t, p)。

Result: 建立的预测模型实现了SOC随时间和PWM占空比的精确预测，为相似机器人提供了能量感知规划的基础。该方法也可扩展到实际环境中不同初始电量和参数。

Conclusion: 该模型为自主机器人的能量管理和路径规划提供了理论与方法支持，具备实际部署和扩展到不同场景的潜力。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of battery state of charge is needed for autonomous robots to plan movements without using up all available power. This work develops a physics and data-informed model from a simulation that predicts SOC depletion as a function of time and PWM duty cycle for a simulated 4-wheel Arduino robot. A forward-motion simulation incorporating motor electrical characteristics (resistance, inductance, back-EMF, torque constant) and mechanical dynamics (mass, drag, rolling resistance, wheel radius) was used to generate SOC time-series data across PWM values from 1-100%. Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy), combined with least-squares regression, was applied to construct a unified nonlinear model that captures SOC(t, p). The framework allows for energy-aware planning for similar robots and can be extended to incorporate arbitrary initial SOC levels and environment-dependent parameters for real-world deployment.

</details>


### [444] [Geometric Look-Angle Shaping Strategy for Enclosed Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00325)
*Amit Shivam,Manuel C. R. M. Fernandes,Sergio Vinha,Fernando A. C. C. Fontes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对无人机在封闭区域内进行巡视的新型几何视角引导策略GLASS，具有全局收敛性、无奇异性，并在仿真中取得了有效结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无人机巡视策略在复杂封闭环境下存在远场失效、路径跟踪稳定性不足和动作受限等问题，难以满足精确、安全的自主巡视需求。

Method: 本方法通过在极坐标框架内嵌入平滑的双曲正切类视角整形函数，对无人机相对期望距离路径的观测角实施约束，引导无人机沿几何一致且有界的路线运动。同时，在引导律中显式加入最大转向速率约束，保证整个作业空间内无奇异点。用Lyapunov方法证明系统在曲率可行条件下的渐近收敛与解析收敛时间。最后，通过高保真6自由度四旋翼仿真验证。

Result: 该策略实现了对指定巡视距离的稳定收敛，并确保引导动态的全局存在性和无奇异性；仿真结果显示其在典型封闭巡视情境下有效。

Conclusion: GLASS为自主无人机在封闭区域的巡视任务提供了一种实用且鲁棒的引导框架，克服了传统方法的限制，具备工程应用前景。

Abstract: This paper introduces inspection through GLASS, a Geometric Look-Angle Shaping Strategy for enclosed regions using unmanned aerial vehicles. In doing so, the vehicles guidance command is constructed through a bounded, geometry-consistent shaping of the look angle relative to a desired standoff path. By embedding a smooth, hyperbolic-tangent-type shaping function within a polar geometric framework, GLASS ensures global existence of the guidance dynamics. It avoids the far-field limitations inherent to conventional formulations. Lyapunov stability analysis establishes asymptotic convergence to a prescribed inspection standoff under explicit curvature feasibility conditions, along with analytical settling-time characteristics. The proposed strategy incorporates maximum turn-rate constraints without inducing singularities throughout the workspace. High-fidelity six-degree-of-freedom quadrotor simulations demonstrate the effectiveness of GLASS in representative enclosed inspection scenarios, highlighting a practically viable guidance framework for autonomous enclosed inspection missions.

</details>


### [445] [Layered Safety: Enhancing Autonomous Collision Avoidance via Multistage CBF Safety Filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00338)
*Erina Yamaguchi,Ryan M. Bena,Gilbert Bahati,Aaron D. Ames*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于本地感知数据的分层安全过滤框架，实现了机器人动态避障的通用端到端方案。核心包括利用点云生成占据图和泊松安全函数，叠加两级过滤，提升鲁棒性和可靠性，并在多种实际场景与平台上验证了优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态避障方法往往依赖全局感知或单一安全过滤，难以应对复杂、动态、局部感知的环境，因此需要构建更鲁棒、普适的安全避障方法。

Method: 方法以点云为输入，构建占据图并生成泊松安全函数（PSF），将PSF作为控制障碍函数（CBF）嵌入两级安全过滤器：第一级预测层在短时序列内约束轨迹安全性，第二级实时层即时修正并由底层控制器跟踪保证系统全阶安全，并对比分析单级过滤效果。

Result: 多平台、多动态实际环境下，所提出分层结构在避障鲁棒性和轨迹最优性上均优于传统单级安全过滤方法，通过帕累托分析和实验详尽验证。

Conclusion: 两级基于PSF和CBF的安全过滤架构在可靠性、鲁棒性和通用性方面具有显著优势，为多样机器人动态避障提供了可行、实用的新思路。

Abstract: This paper presents a general end-to-end framework for constructing robust and reliable layered safety filters that can be leveraged to perform dynamic collision avoidance over a broad range of applications using only local perception data. Given a robot-centric point cloud, we begin by constructing an occupancy map which is used to synthesize a Poisson safety function (PSF). The resultant PSF is employed as a control barrier function (CBF) within two distinct safety filtering stages. In the first stage, we propose a predictive safety filter to compute optimal safe trajectories based on nominal potentially-unsafe commands. The resultant short-term plans are constrained to satisfy the CBF condition along a finite prediction horizon. In the second stage, instantaneous velocity commands are further refined by a real-time CBF-based safety filter and tracked by the full-order low-level robot controller. Assuming accurate tracking of velocity commands, we obtain formal guarantees of safety for the full-order system. We validate the optimality and robustness of our multistage architecture, in comparison to traditional single-stage safety filters, via a detailed Pareto analysis. We further demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of our collision avoidance methodology on multiple legged robot platforms across a variety of real-world dynamic scenarios.

</details>


### [446] [Acoustic Sensing for Universal Jamming Grippers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00351)
*Lion Weber,Theodor Wienert,Martin Splettstößer,Alexander Koenig,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于声学传感的万向夹持手，可在无需传统触觉传感器的情况下，通过机体本身感知物体信息，提升夹持未知物体时的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统触觉传感器会降低软体夹持手的顺应性，影响其对未知物体的抓取能力，因此需要一种不影响顺应性的感知方法。

Method: 在夹持手腔体内（远离变形膜）布置扬声器和麦克风，通过声波传播方式获取夹持时的声学信号，并利用机器学习方法重构物体属性。

Result: 该声学传感方法可以高分辨率（2.6 mm尺寸误差、0.6度角度误差）感知物体，并能在80dBA环境噪声下保持鲁棒。材料判别准确率最高可达100%，能对16类日用品区分准确率达85.6%。在真实抓取分拣任务中，系统可以持续工作53分钟，夹持性能未受损失。

Conclusion: 本文提出的声学形态传感方案在不牺牲软体夹持顺应性的前提下，实现了高精度、高鲁棒性的物体感知，为柔性机械手的实用落地和进一步智能化提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Universal jamming grippers excel at grasping unknown objects due to their compliant bodies. Traditional tactile sensors can compromise this compliance, reducing grasping performance. We present acoustic sensing as a form of morphological sensing, where the gripper's soft body itself becomes the sensor. A speaker and microphone are placed inside the gripper cavity, away from the deformable membrane, fully preserving compliance. Sound propagates through the gripper and object, encoding object properties, which are then reconstructed via machine learning. Our sensor achieves high spatial resolution in sensing object size (2.6 mm error) and orientation (0.6 deg error), remains robust to external noise levels of 80 dBA, and discriminates object materials (up to 100% accuracy) and 16 everyday objects (85.6% accuracy). We validate the sensor in a realistic tactile object sorting task, achieving 53 minutes of uninterrupted grasping and sensing, confirming the preserved grasping performance. Finally, we demonstrate that disentangled acoustic representations can be learned, improving robustness to irrelevant acoustic variations.

</details>


### [447] [TMR-VLA:Vision-Language-Action Model for Magnetic Motion Control of Tri-leg Silicone-based Soft Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00420)
*Ruijie Tang,Chi Kit Ng,Kaixuan Wu,Long Bai,Guankun Wang,Yiming Huang,Yupeng Wang,Hongliang Ren*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种三足磁驱动软体机器人（TMR），并基于其开发了端到端多模态控制系统TMR-VLA，实现了多样动作控制和语言约束下的导航能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体内环境下，软体机器人具有无创操作和精确控制的优势，能为无痛检测和治疗带来新方法。但现有软体机器人在导航和多变动作表现上的控制难题尚未解决。

Method: 设计一种三足磁驱动的硅胶软体机器人（TMR），其动作可分为蹲伏、旋转、抬腿、行走等序列。通过TMR-VLA系统，将自然语言指令和连续视觉帧作为输入，基于具体动作类型生成底层电压输出，实现机器人多变动作与自主导航。系统融合了EndoVLA的内腔定位能力。

Result: TMR-VLA能准确预测作用于TMR的电压如何改变软体机器人的动态表现，平均动作成功率为74%。

Conclusion: TMR-VLA端到端系统实现了软体机器人在复杂体内环境下的多模态自主导航，为无创医学检测和治疗提供了潜力方向。

Abstract: In-vivo environments, magnetically actuated soft robots offer advantages such as wireless operation and precise control, showing promising potential for painless detection and therapeutic procedures. We developed a trileg magnetically driven soft robot (TMR) whose multi-legged design enables more flexible gaits and diverse motion patterns. For the silicone made of reconfigurable soft robots, its navigation ability can be separated into sequential motions, namely squatting, rotation, lifting a leg, walking and so on. Its motion and behavior depend on its bending shapes. To bridge motion type description and specific low-level voltage control, we introduced TMR-VLA, an end-to-end multi-modal system for a trileg magnetic soft robot capable of performing hybrid motion types, which is promising for developing a navigation ability by adapting its shape to language-constrained motion types. The TMR-VLA deploys embodied endoluminal localization ability from EndoVLA, and fuses sequential frames and natural language commands as input. Low-level voltage output is generated based on the current observation state and specific motion type description. The result shows the TMR-VLA can predict how the voltage applied to TMR will change the dynamics of a silicon-made soft robot. The TMR-VLA reached a 74% average success rate.

</details>


### [448] [HydroShear: Hydroelastic Shear Simulation for Tactile Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00446)
*An Dang,Jayjun Lee,Mustafa Mukadam,X. Alice Wu,Bernadette Bucher,Manikantan Nambi,Nima Fazeli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的触觉仿真方法HydroShear，实现了在接触丰富任务中更高精度的sim-to-real策略迁移。该方法有效提升了实际触觉剪切力的模拟能力，使得强化学习策略无需微调即可从仿真顺利迁移到实际任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法多以视觉为主，忽视了触觉中的力与剪切力的复杂动态，导致策略在仿真与现实之间存在较大差距，尤其是在复杂的灵巧操作任务中。该工作旨在缩小触觉仿真的sim-to-real差距，提高触觉策略的泛化能力。

Method: 作者开发了HydroShear，一个基于非完整流体弹性模型的触觉仿真器，可以精准模拟stick-slip转换、路径相关的力与剪切力积累以及完整的物体-传感器交互。它基于SDFs追踪与计算压头与传感膜的接触点位移，从而生成高速、物理真实的力场，并可适应任意封闭几何模型。

Result: 在GelSight Minis设备及四项真实任务（插销、装箱、书本上架、抽屉拉动）实验中，HydroShear较现有方法更真实再现了触觉剪切力，实现了零样本迁移，平均成功率达93%，显著优于基于触觉图像的策略和现有剪切模拟方法。

Conclusion: HydroShear极大提升了触觉仿真的真实性，使基于触觉的强化学习策略能够更顺利地从仿真迁移到现实，提升了复杂灵巧任务的操作成功率，对触觉机器人学领域具有积极推动作用。

Abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of tactile sim-to-real policy transfer for contact-rich tasks. Existing methods primarily focus on vision-based sensors and emphasize image rendering quality while providing overly simplistic models of force and shear. Consequently, these models exhibit a large sim-to-real gap for many dexterous tasks. Here, we present HydroShear, a non-holonomic hydroelastic tactile simulator that advances the state-of-the-art by modeling: a) stick-slip transitions, b) path-dependent force and shear build up, and c) full SE(3) object-sensor interactions. HydroShear extends hydroelastic contact models using Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) to track the displacements of the on-surface points of an indenter during physical interaction with the sensor membrane. Our approach generates physics-based, computationally efficient force fields from arbitrary watertight geometries while remaining agnostic to the underlying physics engine. In experiments with GelSight Minis, HydroShear more faithfully reproduces real tactile shear compared to existing methods.
